languages.text: "Поразительная точность в ритуалах технотаинств! Я бы познакомился с тем, кто вас юстировал".
"Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."
languages.original_text: "Поразительная точность в ритуалах технотаинств! Я бы познакомился с тем, кто вас юстировал".

traits.locale_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."
"Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."
"Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

languages.text: “你的技术圣礼仪式执行得相当精准！我倒真想会会调校你的高人。”
languages.original_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

traits.locale_text: “你的技术圣礼仪式执行得相当精准！我倒真想会会调校你的高人。”

languages.text: « Vous avez fait montre d'une précision remarquable lors des rituels des technosacrements ! J'aimerais rencontrer la personne qui vous a {mf|calibré|calibrée}. »
languages.original_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez fait montre d'une précision remarquable lors des rituels des technosacrements ! J'aimerais rencontrer la personne qui vous a {mf|calibré|calibrée}. »

languages.text: "Tekno kutsiyet ayinlerinde olağanüstü bir hassasiyet! Sizi kalibre eden kişiyle tanışmak isterim."
languages.original_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

traits.locale_text: "Tekno kutsiyet ayinlerinde olağanüstü bir hassasiyet! Sizi kalibre eden kişiyle tanışmak isterim."

languages.text: «¡Una precisión extraordinaria en los rituales de los tecnosacramentos! Me gustaría conocer a la persona que l{mf|e|a} calibró».
languages.original_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

traits.locale_text: «¡Una precisión extraordinaria en los rituales de los tecnosacramentos! Me gustaría conocer a la persona que l{mf|e|a} calibró».

languages.text: "Bemerkenswerte Präzision hinsichtlich der Riten der Tech-Sakramente. Ich würde gerne die Person treffen, die Euch kalibriert hat."
languages.original_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

traits.locale_text: "Bemerkenswerte Präzision hinsichtlich der Riten der Tech-Sakramente. Ich würde gerne die Person treffen, die Euch kalibriert hat."

languages.text: 「テクノロジーの聖典における儀式における驚異的な正確さ！ 較正してくれた人に会いたい。」
languages.original_text: "Remarkable accuracy in the rituals of the tech-sacraments! I would like to meet the person who calibrated you."

traits.locale_text: 「テクノロジーの聖典における儀式における驚異的な正確さ！ 較正してくれた人に会いたい。」
